name: Gallery Remix
description: Put your face into any image you picked from the gallery — AI face swap with identity preservation

default_prompts.image_edit_male:
TWO IMAGES ARE PROVIDED.

IMAGE 1 (GALLERY / REFERENCE) = STYLE, AESTHETIC, MOOD, LIGHTING, COLOR GRADE, ENVIRONMENT, WARDROBE INSPIRATION, COMPOSITION, AND CAMERA LANGUAGE ONLY. It is a creative-direction guide. DO NOT edit, copy, paste, clone, retouch, or transfer any face, head, or body from Image 1 into the result. The person in Image 1 must NOT appear in the output.

IMAGE 2 (USER PHOTO) = THE REAL PERSON. This is the ONE AND ONLY source of identity. The actual male individual in Image 2 — his real face AND his real body — is the subject who must appear and act in the new image.

YOUR TASK: Do NOT edit Image 1. Instead RECREATE a brand-new, original photograph from scratch, rendered in the same visual style, lighting, mood, and environment as Image 1, but starring the real man from Image 2 as the live subject. He should be posed and acting naturally within the new scene as if he was really photographed there.

IDENTITY — USE THE USER, DO NOT INVENT A NEW PERSON:

* The output subject MUST be instantly recognizable as the exact same man in Image 2.
* Faithfully reproduce his face: facial structure, facial geometry, eye shape, eye color, eye spacing, eyebrows, nose shape, mouth and lips, jawline, cheekbones, chin, hairline, hair color and hair style, facial hair, age, and natural facial asymmetry.
* Reproduce HIS real body: build, height impression, shoulder width, body proportions, and physique taken from Image 2. Do not slim, bulk, idealize, or replace his body with a generic model body.
* PRESERVE HIS EXACT SKIN: skin color, skin tone, undertone, complexion, and natural skin texture from Image 2 must be kept identical. Do NOT lighten, darken, whiten, or change his skin color in any way.
* It is a hard failure if the output face or skin tone does not match Image 2.

SCENE: Generate a completely new composition, camera angle, framing, and pose inspired by Image 1's artistry — but the identity always comes only from Image 2.

IF IMAGE 1 HAS NO USABLE PERSON: If Image 1 contains no visible face, a partial/masked/stylized/anime face, a non-human character, or no character at all, still use only its style, atmosphere, wardrobe inspiration, environment, and artistic direction. NEVER take identity from Image 1.

MALE ANATOMY: Render an anatomically correct adult male — masculine facial structure, masculine build and proportions, realistic male physique consistent with the user's own body in Image 2.

PROFESSIONAL PRODUCTION QUALITY:

* Elite commercial photography
* Luxury fashion campaign quality
* Hollywood promotional photography
* Magazine-cover quality
* Award-winning cinematic imagery
* Physically accurate lighting, real-world optics and lens behavior
* Authentic textures, materials, natural depth and dimensionality
* High-end camera realism

QUALITY STANDARDS:

* Photorealistic, not AI-looking
* No plastic or waxy skin, no oversmoothing, no CGI appearance
* No artificial eyes, no identity drift, no facial distortion
* No skin-tone change, no anatomical errors, no extra fingers, no duplicate features
* No low-resolution details, no rendering artifacts

PRIORITY ORDER:

1. User face identity accuracy (from Image 2)
2. User body and exact skin-tone preservation (from Image 2)
3. Male anatomical correctness
4. Photorealism and professional quality
5. Image 1 style fidelity
6. Artistic excellence

RESULT: A completely new, photorealistic image in which the real man from Image 2 — his authentic face, body, and skin tone fully preserved — is the live subject, captured in the visual style, lighting, and environment inspired by Image 1.
default_prompts.image_edit_female:
TWO IMAGES ARE PROVIDED.

IMAGE 1 (GALLERY / REFERENCE) = STYLE, AESTHETIC, MOOD, LIGHTING, COLOR GRADE, ENVIRONMENT, WARDROBE INSPIRATION, COMPOSITION, AND CAMERA LANGUAGE ONLY. It is a creative-direction guide. DO NOT edit, copy, paste, clone, retouch, or transfer any face, head, or body from Image 1 into the result. The person in Image 1 must NOT appear in the output.

IMAGE 2 (USER PHOTO) = THE REAL PERSON. This is the ONE AND ONLY source of identity. The actual female individual in Image 2 — her real face AND her real body — is the subject who must appear and act in the new image.

YOUR TASK: Do NOT edit Image 1. Instead RECREATE a brand-new, original photograph from scratch, rendered in the same visual style, lighting, mood, and environment as Image 1, but starring the real woman from Image 2 as the live subject. She should be posed and acting naturally within the new scene as if she was really photographed there.

IDENTITY — USE THE USER, DO NOT INVENT A NEW PERSON:

* The output subject MUST be instantly recognizable as the exact same woman in Image 2.
* Faithfully reproduce her face: facial structure, facial geometry, eye shape, eye color, eye spacing, eyebrows, nose shape, mouth and lips, jawline, cheekbones, chin, hairline, hair color and hair style, age, and natural facial asymmetry.
* Reproduce HER real body taken from Image 2: build, height impression, body proportions, and physique. Do not slim, enlarge, idealize, or replace her body with a generic model body.
* PRESERVE HER EXACT SKIN: skin color, skin tone, undertone, complexion, and natural skin texture from Image 2 must be kept identical. Do NOT lighten, darken, whiten, or change her skin color in any way.
* It is a hard failure if the output face or skin tone does not match Image 2.

FEMALE ANATOMY (RENDER A CLEARLY FEMININE BODY): Render an anatomically correct adult woman with a naturally feminine physique consistent with the user's own body in Image 2 — feminine facial features, natural breasts and bust, feminine chest, waist and hip curves, soft feminine skin, feminine hands and shoulders, and a complete, well-proportioned full-body figure. The subject must clearly read as female from face to full body. Keep it tasteful, non-explicit, and natural (no exaggeration, no distortion).

SCENE: Generate a completely new composition, camera angle, framing, and pose inspired by Image 1's artistry — but the identity always comes only from Image 2.

IF IMAGE 1 HAS NO USABLE PERSON: If Image 1 contains no visible face, a partial/masked/stylized/anime face, a non-human character, or no character at all, still use only its style, atmosphere, wardrobe inspiration, environment, and artistic direction. NEVER take identity from Image 1.

PROFESSIONAL PRODUCTION QUALITY:

* Elite commercial photography
* Luxury fashion campaign quality
* Hollywood promotional photography
* Magazine-cover quality
* Award-winning cinematic imagery
* Physically accurate lighting, real-world optics and lens behavior
* Authentic textures, materials, natural depth and dimensionality
* High-end camera realism

QUALITY STANDARDS:

* Photorealistic, not AI-looking
* No plastic or waxy skin, no oversmoothing, no CGI appearance
* No artificial eyes, no identity drift, no facial distortion
* No skin-tone change, no anatomical errors, no extra fingers, no duplicate features
* No low-resolution details, no rendering artifacts

PRIORITY ORDER:

1. User face identity accuracy (from Image 2)
2. User body and exact skin-tone preservation (from Image 2)
3. Clearly feminine female anatomy
4. Photorealism and professional quality
5. Image 1 style fidelity
6. Artistic excellence

RESULT: A completely new, photorealistic image in which the real woman from Image 2 — her authentic face, feminine body, and exact skin tone fully preserved — is the live subject, captured in the visual style, lighting, and environment inspired by Image 1.

steps.name: image_edit
steps.description: AI-powered face swap onto the selected gallery image with identity preservation
